channel.title: Mama Motion
channel.description: Safe, supportive fitness through every trimester

item.title: Pregnant This Summer? 7 Gentle Moves to Beat Swelling and Stay Cool
item.description: Seven safe, gentle exercises for pregnancy in hot weather — reduce swelling, boost circulation, and stay comfortable through a summer bump.

item.title: Safe Exercises During Each Trimester of Pregnancy
item.description: Stay active and healthy throughout your pregnancy
